$comment: ExpertMachina scope seed. The Steward copies this to handoffs/current-scope.json when ratifying an ExpertMachina workstream, fills every <PLACEHOLDER>, and may tighten — never weaken — the pre-filled policy fields. forbiddenGlobs and the three profile proofs below are standing policy from CLAUDE.profile.md; adjust glob paths to the actual repo layout when the project tree is known.
nonGoals: No changes to the governance/approval pipeline

proofRequirements.command: <test command for the touched surface's no-evidence state>
proofRequirements.mustShow: explicit 'no governed evidence available' rendering; no fabricated fields (profile rule 1)
no write path from workbench/feature code to canonical state (profile rules 3-4)
scope-filtered results plus at least one denied-access case (profile rule 7)

rollbackAnchor: <git tag/branch created before first Builder edit>
stopConditions: Builder stops when proofs run and handoff is written; does not merge
Sweeper stops if baseline suite is red
Any agent stops immediately if work requires editing a forbiddenGlob
Any agent stops immediately upon finding an existing write path from workbench code to canonical state (critical defect, report to human)
